notes: Roman Emperor from 450 to 457, noted for his devout Christian faith and association with Pope Leo the Great.

docs.title: Letter 138
docs.author: Theodoret of Cyrrhus
docs.subject_summary: I have cordially welcomed the rest which has fallen to my lot, and am harvesting its beneficial and pleasant results. Our Christ-loving Emperor, after reaping the empire as fruit of his true piety, ha
docs.excerpt: … urgent counsel, encourage our most pious emperor and the Christ-loving Augusta -- already zealous as they are -- to strengthen their glorious empire by laudable and righteous action.
